stories.title: Nine Tarik Skubal blockbuster proposals that would...
stories.summary: Where should Detroit send the best pitcher on the planet? Here are our best offers for the Tigers ace.

stories.title: Better than AI: What makes Mason Miller so hard to...
stories.summary: Not even MLB's most advanced technology can replicate the dominant San Diego Padres closer.

stories.title: Sources: QB Brissett to report for Cards minicamp
stories.summary: Cardinals quarterback Jacoby Brissett will report for Arizona's mandatory minicamp this week, sources told ESPN, after holding out for all of the team's offseason program while he awaits a reworked contract for this season.

stories.title: 'A dream': Korda wins coveted U.S. Women's Open
stories.summary: Nelly Korda won her first U.S. Women's Open on Sunday -- and her second consecutive major victory -- holding off Charley Hull and Gaby Lopez by one shot when her final 2½-foot par putt curled perilously around the cup and finally dropped in.

stories.title: Knicks try to ignore hoopla, focus on G3 at MSG
stories.summary: If the day before Madison Square Garden's first NBA Finals game since June 25, 1999, was any indication, Monday's Game 3 between the Spurs and Knicks will be a madhouse. But Knicks players are doing their best to stay focused.
